name: Farcaster
description: Farcaster connector for publishing casts and responding to social conversations.

ENABLE_CAST.label: Cast
ENABLE_CAST.help: Enables or disables the ability to post casts to Farcaster.

FARCASTER_FID.label: Fid
FARCASTER_FID.help: The Farcaster FID (user identifier) used to publish or manage casts for a specific account.

ACTION_INTERVAL.label: Interval
ACTION_INTERVAL.help: Interval in minutes between action-processing cycles.

MAX_CAST_LENGTH.label: Cast Length
MAX_CAST_LENGTH.help: Maximum number of characters allowed in a Farcaster cast.

CAST_IMMEDIATELY.label: Immediately
CAST_IMMEDIATELY.help: If true, posts are published immediately instead of waiting for a schedule.

CAST_INTERVAL_MAX.label: Interval Max
CAST_INTERVAL_MAX.help: Maximum interval in minutes between automated posts.

CAST_INTERVAL_MIN.label: Interval Min
CAST_INTERVAL_MIN.help: Minimum interval in minutes between automated posts.

FARCASTER_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
FARCASTER_DRY_RUN.help: Enables or disables dry run mode when interacting with Farcaster; when true, operations are simulated but not executed.

FARCASTER_HUB_URL.label: Hub Url
FARCASTER_HUB_URL.help: Base URL for the Farcaster hub the client should communicate with.

FARCASTER_SIGNER_UUID.label: Signer Uuid
FARCASTER_SIGNER_UUID.help: UUID of the Neynar signer associated with the Farcaster account, required to sign casts.

MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.label: Actions Processing
MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.help: Maximum number of Farcaster actions to process in a single batch.

FARCASTER_POLL_INTERVAL.label: Poll Interval
FARCASTER_POLL_INTERVAL.help: Polling interval in seconds for Farcaster operations such as fetching new casts.

ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.label: Action Processing
ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.help: Turns on or off automated action processing for Farcaster events.

FARCASTER_NEYNAR_API_KEY.label: Neynar Api Key
FARCASTER_NEYNAR_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate with the Neynar Farcaster API.
